name: AI / Machine Learning
description: Sviluppo e training di modelli ML/DL con PyTorch, TensorFlow e accelerazione ROCm/CUDA

shell_aliases.torch-check: python3 -c "import torch; print('PyTorch:', torch.__version__); print('CUDA:', torch.cuda.is_available()); print('ROCm:', torch.cuda.is_available())"
shell_aliases.tf-check: python3 -c "import tensorflow as tf; print('TF:', tf.__version__); print('GPU:', tf.config.list_physical_devices('GPU'))"

dotfiles.zshrc_extra:
# ROCm (AMD GPU)
export ROCM_PATH=/opt/rocm
export PATH=$PATH:$ROCM_PATH/bin
export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=$ROCM_PATH/lib:$LD_LIBRARY_PATH

# HuggingFace cache
export TRANSFORMERS_CACHE=$HOME/.cache/huggingface
export HF_HOME=$HOME/.cache/huggingface

welcome_message: Benvenuto nel tuo ambiente AI/ML! PyTorch, TensorFlow e Transformers sono installati con supporto ROCm per la tua AMD RX 6600. Usa 'torch-check' per verificare che la GPU sia riconosciuta. Avvia JupyterLab con 'jlab'.

recommended_projects.name: Fine-tuning LLM con PEFT/LoRA
recommended_projects.command: mkdir my-finetune && cd my-finetune && python3 -c "from peft import get_peft_model; print('PEFT pronto!')"

recommended_projects.name: Classificatore immagini PyTorch
recommended_projects.command: mkdir my-classifier && cd my-classifier && jupyter lab
